missing.same_dots_just_turned_sideways_learn_o: Same dots, just turned sideways. Learn one fact, know two.
missing.this_is_one_of_the_tricky_15_facts_the: This is one of the Tricky 15 facts — the small set that needs real recall. Switch to Practice → "Tricky 15" mode to drill it.
missing.same_numbers_four_faces_knowing_one_fa: Same numbers, four faces. Knowing one fact gives you the others.
missing.pick_a_pattern_to_highlight_the_table_: 🔍 Pick a pattern to highlight. The table is full of structure — once you see it, half the facts become predictable.
missing.click_any_pattern_above_to_light_up_th: 👆 Click any pattern above to light up the cells and read the rule. Multiple patterns may overlap (e.g., 5×5 is both a "5s multiple" and a "perfect square").
missing.you_only_need_to_memorize_about_a_thir: You only need to memorize about a third of the table.
missing.anything_in_the_1s_2s_5s_10s_11s_colum: Anything in the 1s, 2s, 5s, 10s, 11s columns has an easy rule. The squares are a small set (12 facts). What remains is the "tricky middle" — about 15 facts — that needs real recall: 6×7, 6×8, 6×9, 7×8, 7×9, 8×9 and their twins.
missing.distributive_shortcut_for_the_tricky_m: Distributive shortcut for the tricky middle.
missing.forget_7_8_7_8_5_8_2_8_40_16_56_build_: Forget 7×8? 7×8 = 5×8 + 2×8 = 40 + 16 = 56. Build the hard fact from two easy ones. After enough repetitions, the answer becomes automatic.
missing.visualizing_each_fact_as_an_area_model: Visualizing each fact as an area-model rectangle (Visual tab) or a pattern (this tab) gives you a path to the answer that does not require automatic recall. Recall builds eventually, but not from drilling alone.
missing.each_cell_a_multiplication_fact_color_: Each cell = a multiplication fact. Color = your mastery so far. Click any cell to drill that exact fact.
missing.fact_family_same_numbers_four_faces: 👨‍👩‍👧 Fact family — same numbers, four faces
missing.sliders_for_mastery_threshold_and_sele: Sliders for mastery threshold and selected factor. Discrete 3-state outcome. No score, no reveal.
missing.hypothesis_how_does_threshold_change_f: Hypothesis: How does threshold change feedback for struggling learners?
missing.what_if_mastery_100_what_gets_praised: What if mastery = 100%? What gets praised?
missing.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: I understand — explain in own words
missing.design_note_discrete_3_state_mastery_m: Design note: discrete 3-state mastery marker; no raw score; no reveal — by design.
